name: @gabble/plugin
description: Gabble — lazy dev + token optimizer. Combines ponytail's YAGNI ladder with rtk-style command filtering. Less code, fewer tokens, same answers.
author: Gabble contributors

scripts.test: node -e "require('./hooks/gabble-config'); require('./hooks/gabble-runtime'); require('./hooks/gabble-instructions'); console.log('smoke test passed')"
